metadata.description: Micke Berg's personal Claude Code plugins. Cross-platform, no company specifics.

plugins.name: git-tools
plugins.description: Git workflow skills: a conventional-commit skill (draft, approve, commit) and a GitHub PR skill (build a PR from your commits and open it with gh).

plugins.name: guardrails
plugins.description: A verify skill that runs your project's own checks (lint, typecheck, test, build) and reports honestly, plus an optional off-by-default pre-push gate hook.

plugins.name: recap
plugins.description: Summaries from your git history. Starts with a standup skill that turns your recent commits into a glanceable, spoken-style standup cheat sheet.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Removes signs of AI-generated writing from text: em dash overuse, rule of three, inflated symbolism, vague attributions, AI vocabulary, and more. Based on Wikipedia's "Signs of AI writing" guide.
